title: Qualified company list output
description: Output format produced by the final step of either workflow (Qualify a List or Build a List). This is the final deliverable handed to a CRM, spreadsheet, or outbound workflow.

companies.description: Only confirmed companies, plus anything unclear still pending background verification. not_found and firmographically-disqualified companies must not appear here.

firmographic_fit.description: A short statement of whether/how the company fits the firmographic band, independent of the qualitative criterion.

criterion_status.description: not_found is filtered out before this output is produced; see docs/04-implementation.md phase 5.

evidence.description: The exact supporting text found for the qualitative criterion.
